        // Segment stub (safe without consent)
        // Needed so things that rely on analytics existing don't explode
        window.analytics = window.analytics || [];
        analytics.invoked = true;

        const methodNames = [
          'track', 'page', 'identify', 'reset', 'group', 'alias',
          'ready', 'on', 'once', 'off'
        ];

        // Each of the above methods need to exist on analytics so we instantiate them
        // This is so if something calls analytics before we load our segment environment we dont throw a bunch of errors
        methodNames.forEach(function(methodName) {
          analytics[methodName] = function() {
            const args = Array.prototype.slice.call(arguments);
            analytics.push([methodName].concat(args));
          };
        });

        // Check cmpData for tracking consent - required for enabling segment pixels
        function getTrackingConsent(cmpData) {
          return (
            cmpData &&
            cmpData.purposeConsents &&
            cmpData.purposeConsents.c1 === true
          );
        }

        function clearNonEssentialCookies(trackingConsent) {
          const cookies = document.cookie ? document.cookie.split('; ') : [];

          cookies.forEach(function(cookie) {
            const cookieName = cookie.split('=')[0];

            // Don't delete consent manager cookies cookies
            if (cookieName.indexOf('__cmp') === 0) return;

            // Don't delete session/auth cookies (will not be accessible if HttpOnly, but safe to guard)
            if (cookieName === '_ebth_session') return;
            if (cookieName === 'remember_user_token') return;

            // Cookies cannot be "deleted" by javascript so they have to be overwritten with an expired one
            document.cookie = cookieName + '=; expires=Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT; path=/;';

            // Attempt to clear cookies across all subdomains
            let domainParts = window.location.hostname.split('.');
            while (domainParts.length > 1) {
              let domain = '.' + domainParts.join('.');
              document.cookie = cookieName + '=; expires=Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT; path=/; domain=' + domain + ';';
              domainParts.shift();
            }
          });

          localStorage.clear();
          sessionStorage.clear();
          // Put tracking consent back into storage
          if (typeof trackingConsent !== 'undefined' && trackingConsent !== null) {
            localStorage.setItem('tracking_consent', trackingConsent);
          }
          window.location.reload();
        }

        (function () {
          if (typeof window.__cmp !== 'function') return;

          let segmentBootstrapped = false;

          // Retrieve consent data contextually select segment environment
          function handleConsent(source) {
            if (segmentBootstrapped) return;

            const cmpData = window.__cmp('getCMPData');
            if (!cmpData || !cmpData.purposesList || cmpData.purposesList.length === 0) {
              return;
            }


            const trackingConsented = getTrackingConsent(cmpData);

            // Shove tracking_consent into local storage
            localStorage.setItem('tracking_consent', trackingConsented);

            const environment = 'production';
            const environmentNoTracking = 'production_no_tracking';

            const finalEnvironment = trackingConsented
              ? environment
              : environmentNoTracking;
            loadSegment(finalEnvironment);


            segmentBootstrapped = true;
          }

          // Listen for consent events 
          // "consent-loaded" is first page load
          // "useraction" is user making a change via modal
          __cmp('addEventListener', ['consent', function (eventName, cmpObject, subtype) {
            // Initial load event
            if (subtype === 'consent-loaded') {
              handleConsent('cmp-event-loaded');
              return;
            }

            // User Changed preferences
            // Wipe cookies & storage and reload the page
            if (subtype === 'useraction') {
              const cmpData = window.__cmp('getCMPData');

              const newConsent = getTrackingConsent(cmpData);
              localStorage.setItem('tracking_consent', newConsent);
              clearNonEssentialCookies(newConsent);
            }
          }, false], null);

          // Shouldn't occur but just in case event fires before we add our initial listener and as a result
          // never receive loading consent
          const immediateData = window.__cmp('getCMPData');
          if (immediateData && immediateData.purposesList && immediateData.purposesList.length > 0) {
            handleConsent('immediate-read');
          }

        })();

        // Segment is loaded either with or without tracking pixels based on consent status of "tracking" purpose in consent manager
        function loadSegment(finalEnvironment) {
          if (window.__segmentLoaded) return;
          window.__segmentLoaded = true;

          const segmentUrls = {
            'production': 'https://evs.ajs.ebth.com/P55JLkroUs/tqXvPIYo23.min.js',
            'production_no_tracking': 'https://cdn.segment.com/analytics.js/v1/9IMeHAx85XZrdQPSmwubNM0nDO6OB4rk/analytics.min.js'
          };

          const segmentKeys = {
            'production': 'h3b1R91U2LUyrAzgmDQioFXQcb8k99Rk',
            'production_no_tracking': '9IMeHAx85XZrdQPSmwubNM0nDO6OB4rk'
          };

            analytics.invoked = true;
            analytics.methods = [

              "identify","reset","group","track","ready","alias","debug",
              "page","once","off","on","addSourceMiddleware",

            ];

    /* ############################################################################ */
    /* # This script sanitizes public user inputs to prevent non UTF-8 characters # */
    /* ############################################################################ */

    // this is the char range for text characters
    var MAX_CHAR_VALUE = 591;

    document.querySelectorAll('form').forEach((form) => {
      form.addEventListener('submit', (e) => {
        sanitizeUserInputs(form);
      });
    });

    function sanitizeUserInputs(form) {
      var selector = '';

      var inputTypesToSanitize = [
        'email',
        'search',
        'tel',
        'text'
      ];

      for (var i = 0; i < inputTypesToSanitize.length; i++) {
        selector += 'input[type="' + inputTypesToSanitize[i] + '"]';
        if (i < inputTypesToSanitize.length - 1) {
          selector += ',';
        }
      }

      form.querySelectorAll(selector).forEach((input) => {
        var output = '';

        for (var i = 0; i < input.value.length; i++) {
          if (input.value.charCodeAt(i) <= MAX_CHAR_VALUE) {
            output += input.value.charAt(i);
          }
        }

        input.value = output
          .replace(/[{}\[\]]/g, '')
          .replace(/\s{2,}/g, ' ')
          .trim();
      });
    }
